channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Maternal influenza infection during pregnancy and subsequent risk of inflammatory bowel diseases in offspring: a nationwide birth cohort study in South Korea.
Shifting Towards Empagliflozin First-Line Therapy in Glycogen Storage Disease Type Ib: A Nationwide Real-World Study.
item.description: Journal of inherited metabolic disease - Neutrophil dysfunction and neutropenia are burdensome findings in glycogen storage disease type Ib (GSDIb). Treatment with granulocyte-colony stimulating factor (G-CSF) often corrects neutropenia b...

item.title: American Gastroenterological Association Clinical Practice Update on Diagnosis and Treatment of Hemorrhoids: Expert Review.
item.description: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association - Hemorrhoids are a common problem. The diagnosis and treatment can be challenging. Gastroenterologists have much to offer these patients. The purpose of this American Gastroenterological Association...
